en.WD: Weapon Damage — total % bonus to bullet damage
en.CHC: Critical Hit Chance — chance to deal critical damage (cap 60%)
en.CHD: Critical Hit Damage — bonus damage on critical hits
en.HSD: Headshot Damage — bonus damage for headshots
en.DtA: Damage to Armor — bonus vs armored targets
en.OoC: Out of Cover — bonus vs targets not in cover
en.RPM: Rounds Per Minute — weapon fire rate
en.REL: Reload Speed — time to reload weapon
